verification.subject: Account Verification
verification.description: Thank you for registering! Please verify your account by clicking the button below.
verification.footer: If you did not create this account, please ignore this email or click Reject.
verification.success: Your account has been verified successfully!

locked.subject: Your account has been locked
locked.title: Account Locked
locked.message: Your account {0} has been locked {1} by {2}.
locked.note: If you have any questions, please contact the administrator.

unlocked.subject: Your account has been unlocked
unlocked.title: Account Unlocked
unlocked.message: Your account {0} has been unlocked by {1}.
unlocked.note: You can now log in and use the system normally.

unlocked.subject: Your account has been automatically unlocked
unlocked.title: Account Auto-Unlocked
unlocked.message: Your account {0} has been automatically unlocked by the system due to the lock period expiring.
unlocked.note: You can now log in and use the system normally.

updated.subject: Your account information has been updated
updated.title: Account Updated
updated.message: Your account {0} information has been updated by {1}.
updated.note: If you did not make this change, please contact the administrator.

verification.subject: Account Registration Confirmation
verification.title: Account Registration Confirmation
verification.message: Thank you for registering an account with us. To complete the registration process, please confirm by clicking one of the two buttons below:

note.title: Note:
note.approve: If you click "Approve", your account will be activated and you can log in.
note.reject: If you click "Reject", the account will be deleted from the system.

footer.ignore: If you did not register this account, please ignore this email.

result.approved: Account has been successfully activated! You can log in now.
result.rejected: Registration has been rejected. The account has been deleted from the system.

invalid.token: Token is invalid or has expired

error.message: An error occurred while processing the request

close.instruction: You can close this page and return to the login screen.

alert.subject: New Login Detected
alert.title: New Login Detected
alert.note: If you did not perform this login, please contact us immediately to protect your account.

footer.auto: This email is sent automatically from the system. Please do not reply to this email.

verification.subject: Account Password Reset - Verification Required
verification.content: Your account password has been reset by an administrator. Please verify this action to activate your account.
verification.action: Please click one of the buttons below to verify this password reset:

warning.title: Important Security Notice
warning.content: Please change this password immediately after logging in for security reasons. This temporary password should not be shared with anyone.

result.subtitle: Your account has been activated successfully

register.success: Registration successful. Please check your email to verify your account

verification.sent: Registration verification email sent successfully. Please check your email and click the confirmation link.

auth.unactive: The account has not been activated.

sent.email: OTP has been sent via email

loaded.count: Loaded %d messages to database for language: %s

with.cache: Loaded messages to database and Redis cache for language: %s
with.cache.count: Loaded %d messages to database and Redis cache for language: %s

cache.failed: Loaded to database but cache failed: %s

loaded.count: Loaded %d messages from JSON to database for language: %s

to.db: Loaded %d messages from JSON to database
to.redis: Loaded %d messages from JSON to Redis
to.both: Loaded %d messages to database and %d to Redis

deleted.both: Deleted {0} messages from database and {1} messages from cache for language '{2}'
deleted.multi: Total deleted {0} messages from database and {1} messages from cache. Details: {2}
deleted.db.multi: Total deleted {0} messages from database. Details: {1}
deleted.cache.multi: Total deleted {0} messages from cache. Details: {1}

loaded.count: Cached {0} messages from database for language: {1}

cleared.language: Cleared cache for language '{0}', total {1} keys
cleared.languages: Cleared cache for {0} languages, total {1} keys. Details: {2}

size.exceeded.category: File size exceeds maximum limit of {0}

images.only: Only image files are allowed (jpg, jpeg, png, gif, bmp, webp, svg, ico)

videos.only: Only video files are allowed (mp4, avi, mov, wmv, flv, mkv, webm)

documents.only: Only document files are allowed (pdf, doc, docx, xls, xlsx, ppt, pptx, txt, csv)

archives.only: Only archive files are allowed (zip, rar, 7z)

multiple.found: Multiple files found, please provide more path filters

name.duplicate: File name already exists in this location

path.invalid: Invalid file path format. Expected: category/filename
